query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month, SUM(totalCents) as total, COUNT(*) as orderCount FROM orders WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'paid' AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 211RzuNU5vXhCm8.645f79bcb929 --database o2whmyWEnyg2xHJMbHxmnn --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month, SUM(totalCents) as total, COUNT(*) as orderCount FROM orders WHERE userId = 1 AND status = 'paid' AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
